mapper.select: SELECT * FROM boards WHERE project_id = #{projectId}::uuid ORDER BY position ASC, created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO boards (id, project_id, name, description, board_type, position, is_archived, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id}::uuid, #{projectId}::uuid, #{name}, #{description}, #{boardType}, #{position}, #{isArchived}, #{createdBy}::uuid, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, NOW()), COALESCE(#{updatedAt}, NOW()) )
mapper.update: UPDATE boards SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, board_type = #{boardType}, position = #{position}, is_archived = #{isArchived}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
